title: Low-Cost Implements to Improve Groundnut Production
abstract: Low-cost, bullock-drawn implements for use in a broadbed and furrow groundnut growing system are described: a broadbed former, broadbed former with fertilizer application attachment, interrow weeder and planter. They are based on an iron T-bar and are attached by standard C-clamps. All had an av. field capacity of approx. 0.2 ha/h.
